title: New Websites
author: benni-ben
body:
I have multiple websites that I crawled: 

- Bouncy Balls(bouncyballs.org)
- Line(csh.bz/line/05x6.html)
- Line Rider(linerider.com)
- Long Doge Challenge(longdogechallenge.com/)
- Mechanical Watch(ciechanow.ski/mechanical-watch/)
- SCREAM INTO THE VOID(screamintothevoid.com)
- Spirograph(bored.com/arcade/spirograph/)
- This is Not a Jumpscare(thisisnotajumpscare.com/)

Not sure if you have any of these, but nevertheless, these are the latest versions of each.
They all should be working on localhost(tested with Five Server VSCode extension).
Repo link: https://github.com/benni-ben/Awesome-Sites-Contribution
I'm also going to be trying to crawl/get the files for Windows93.net(there is a lot), so you can help with that if you want.
I want you to know that I really like what this repository has, and I would like to help in any way that I can. I have experience in this sort of stuff too(since I deal with it quite frequently).

title: CONTRIBUTING INSTRUCTION AND ISSUE TEMPLATE
author: ezshine
body:
# Contributing this Project

## 1. Publish New Site

IssueTitlePrefix : [ NewSite ] Site Name

[ Name ] : Site Name

[ Link ]    : https://xxxxxxxxxxxxx

[ Description ] : 

[ Screenshot ] :

## 2. Report Bugs

IssueTitlePrefix : [ Bug ] Title

[ Repo Link ]  : https://github.com/ezshine/AwesomeSite-Pack01/xxxxxxxx

[ Description ] : Can not running in localhost

## 3. Share this Project
